summary: 30 tests passed, 97.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: ingest_domain() orchestrates the full pipeline: read → process → chunk → index
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented ingest_domain() in ingestion/ingest.py which sequentially calls read_source_documents() → resolve_source_files() → process_document() → chunk_text() → ChromaDBIndexer.create_or_replace_collection() → index_chunks(). Tests TestIngestDomainOrchestration verify the full pipeline call chain with mocks.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Per-document Docling failures are logged and skipped (remaining documents continue)
completion_promises.evidence: The orchestrator catches (DoclingError, FileNotFoundError) per document in a try/except block, logs a warning with the filename, and continues processing remaining documents. Tests TestDoclingFailureHandling.test_skips_failed_documents_and_continues verifies 2 of 3 docs succeed when middle one fails; test_logs_warning_for_failed_document verifies warning log includes filename.

completion_promises.criterion_text: IngestResult populated with correct document count, chunk count, elapsed time
completion_promises.evidence: IngestResult is populated with documents_processed (count of successful docs), chunks_created (from indexer.index_chunks return value), elapsed_seconds (from time.monotonic() delta), domain, and collection_name. Tests TestIngestResultPopulation verify correct document count (3), chunk count (7), and positive elapsed_seconds.

build_parser() creates argparse.ArgumentParser with --domain (required), --chunk-size (int, default 512), --overlap (int, default 64), --force (store_true). Tests TestCLIArgumentParsing verify each argument is parsed correctly with 6 test cases including defaults and required validation.

completion_promises.criterion_text: CLI returns correct exit codes (0-4) per API contract
completion_promises.evidence: cli_main() returns 0 on success, 1 for DomainNotFoundError, 2 for GoalValidationError, 3 for DoclingError, 4 for IndexingError/CollectionExistsError. Tests TestCLIExitCodes verify all 5 exit codes with mocked exceptions.

completion_promises.criterion_text: CLI prints human-readable summary on success
completion_promises.evidence: On success, cli_main() prints a formatted summary to stdout including domain name, collection name, documents processed count, chunks created count, and elapsed time. Test TestCLISummaryOutput.test_prints_summary_on_success verifies all key values appear in stdout.

completion_promises.criterion_text: CLI prints error messages to stderr on failure
completion_promises.evidence: All error handlers in cli_main() print to sys.stderr with descriptive error messages including the exception text. Tests TestCLIErrorOutput verify stderr contains relevant error information for DomainNotFoundError and IndexingError.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Structured JSON logging at key milestones (per ADR-ARCH-007)
completion_promises.evidence: logger.info() calls at key milestones: pipeline start (with domain, chunk_size, overlap, force), file resolution count, per-document processing start/completion, document processing summary, and pipeline completion with stats. Tests TestStructuredLogging verify log messages are emitted for pipeline start (mentions domain name) and completion (mentions 'complete').

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: All three files (ingestion/ingest.py, ingestion/__main__.py, ingestion/tests/test_ingest.py) pass ruff check with zero errors. Compilation verified via py_compile for all files.
